title: Wedding Date and Time
content: The wedding ceremony starts exactly at 4:00 PM on Saturday, October 10th. Guests should arrive starting at 3:30 PM to find their seats.

title: Venue Address and Parking
content: The wedding takes place at The Grand Greenhouse, located at 123 Maple Lane, Nashville, TN. There is a free, dedicated parking lot on-site for all guests.

title: Dress Code
content: The dress code for our wedding is Semi-Formal or Cocktail attire. The ceremony will be outdoors on grass, so please choose your footwear accordingly.
